message:
feat(ufunc): add clip_optional and reshape_order array operations

Extend UFuncArray with two new methods matching NumPy array operation
semantics:

- clip_optional: implements np.clip with independently optional min/max
  bounds, correctly propagating NaN values when either bound is None
- reshape_order: supports reshaping with memory order parameter (C, F, A, K),
  including proper F-order element remapping that reads from the old shape
  and writes into the new shape respecting column-major memory layout

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
